message.content:
@startuml
participant "viewer" as v1
participant "viewer" as v2

participant "Application" as app1
participant "Application" as app2

participant "DB" as db1
participant "DB" as db2

v1 -->> app1 : getListReservedTicket()
v2 -->> app2 : getListReservedTicket()

app1 --> db1 : getListReservedTicket()
app2 --> db2 : getListReservedTicket()

app1 <--> app2 : ListReservedTicket

db1 <--> app1
db2 <--> app2

@enduml
